title: Cleaning Bid Optimizer
description: Industrial-grade tool for optimizing cleaning service bids based on labor, materials, equipment, overhead, and profit margin, with built-in waste reduction and quality adjustment factors.

inputs.label: Total Area (sq ft)
inputs.businessContext: Total cleanable floor area in square feet. Basis for all labor and material calculations.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total cleanable floor area in square feet. Basis for all labor and material calculations.

inputs.label: Cleaning Frequency per Week
inputs.businessContext: Number of times the facility is cleaned per week. Affects labor and consumable usage.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of times the facility is cleaned per week. Affects labor and consumable usage.

inputs.label: Labor Rate ($/hour)
inputs.businessContext: Hourly wage for cleaning staff. Includes base pay, not burden.

businessContext_i18n.en: Hourly wage for cleaning staff. Includes base pay, not burden.

inputs.label: Labor Burden (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage added to labor rate for taxes, insurance, benefits. Typical range 15-35%.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage added to labor rate for taxes, insurance, benefits. Typical range 15-35%.

inputs.label: Productivity Rate (sq ft/hour)
inputs.businessContext: Average area cleaned per person per hour. Based on industry benchmarks (ISSA, BSCAI).

businessContext_i18n.en: Average area cleaned per person per hour. Based on industry benchmarks (ISSA, BSCAI).

inputs.label: Material Cost ($/sq ft)
inputs.businessContext: Cost of cleaning chemicals, paper, and consumables per square foot per cleaning.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost of cleaning chemicals, paper, and consumables per square foot per cleaning.

inputs.label: Equipment Cost ($/sq ft)
inputs.businessContext: Amortized equipment cost (mops, vacuums, buffers) per square foot per cleaning.

businessContext_i18n.en: Amortized equipment cost (mops, vacuums, buffers) per square foot per cleaning.

inputs.label: Overhead (%)
inputs.businessContext: Indirect costs (management, office, insurance) as percentage of direct costs.

businessContext_i18n.en: Indirect costs (management, office, insurance) as percentage of direct costs.

rules.message: Labor rate must be at least federal minimum wage ($7.25).
Productivity rate out of typical range (500-5000 sq ft/hour).
Healthcare quality level requires productivity <= 3000 sq ft/hour for compliance.
Lean methods should reduce waste; consider lowering waste factor to <=10%.

thresholds.message: Bid price seems very low relative to area. Check inputs.
Labor burden above typical maximum (40%). Verify.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
